entryRules.description: Price drops 0.5% below 20-period moving average in low volatility conditions

entry_rules: Price below MA(20) by 0.5% or more

performance_metrics.note: Only valid in very low volatility (< 0.5% hourly). Above this threshold edge disappears. Tested on 1H candles not daily.

cognitive_layer.intent: Capture small price oscillations around the mean in tight ranging conditions
cognitive_layer.philosophy: Grid trading works when volatility is low enough that price oscillates predictably around a centre. Above 0.5% hourly volatility the stops get hit too frequently.
cognitive_layer.mantra: Small moves. Consistent edge. Low volatility only.
cognitive_layer.warning: Do not run in volatile conditions. This strategy loses its edge above 0.5% hourly volatility.

validation.reason: Passed: 77.8% WR, +7.6% return, 9 trades on 1H data

sovereignty.note: Signature to be added by ChronoScribe on filing
